name: VoltAgent
description: TypeScript AI agent framework with lifecycle hooks, MCP tool execution, and multi-agent orchestration.

trust_level.label: auto_generated_draft
trust_level.note: Auto-generated draft. Not yet creator-claimed. Verify before production use.

network.scope: any — agents call arbitrary MCP servers and LLM APIs as configured

pre_action_authorization.note: Requested in VoltAgent/voltagent#1166. OpenTrust passports can serve as the policy source for before_tool_call hooks once implemented.
pre_action_authorization.opentrust_integration_path: Each MCP tool registered with VoltAgent should carry an OpenTrust passport. The before_tool_call hook validates tool.passportId against the OpenTrust registry before execution.

security.injection_protection: None built-in — relies on prompt-level guardrails

flags.title: No pre-action authorization enforcement
flags.description: Tool execution proceeds without verifying the calling agent identity or tool trust level at the framework layer. See VoltAgent/voltagent#1166.
flags.remediation: Integrate OpenTrust passport validation into the before_tool_call hook to enforce trust levels before tool execution.
